item.title: The Presidential BOXING Match Review
item.itunes:title: The Presidential BOXING Match Review
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=laLlUOdD668 The presidential debate is finally here. That is if you can even call it a debate. Cause where both sides flung their fair share of lies, misinformation and question dodging. What I witnessed 並不是辯論. That was a straight up UFC diss battle. So where everyone is giving their in depth analysis of who said what, today, we’re gonna focus on the top most brutal punches, takedowns and traps between the orange man and the chameleon. FOLLOW ME https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB 聯絡信箱: goodbikemob@gmail.com #kamalaharris #donaldtrumpnews #election2024 #cnn #川普 #presidentialdebate2024

item.title: This Interview RUINED her campaign. The Orange Man makes his COMEBACK.
item.itunes:title: This Interview RUINED her campaign. The Orange Man makes his COMEBACK.
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z0BrFaBPD0w In a dramatic turn of events, Kamala Harris's recent interview—her first in nearly 40 days—unfolded as a high-stakes fiasco. Scheduled on CNN, the interview was expected to be a safe platform with soft questions designed to polish her public image. Instead, Harris's responses led to a fiery backlash, with the interview garnering over 35,000 dislikes—almost triple the number of likes it received. This may be the most cringe-worthy interview you've ever witnessed. Meanwhile, Donald Trump appears to be recalibrating his approach as he gears up for the final stretch of the presidential race. In a surprising move that aligns with our earlier suggestions, Trump might be setting the stage for a potential comeback. Buckle up for a front-row seat to the ultimate showdown: the Angry Orange Man versus the Joyful Word Salad Warrior. FOLLOW ME https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB #kamalaharris #donaldtrumpnews #election2024 #cnn #川普
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z0BrFaBPD0w In a dramatic turn of events, Kamala Harris's recent interview—her first in nearly 40 days—unfolded as a high-stakes fiasco. Scheduled on CNN, the interview was expected to be a safe platform with soft questions designed to polish her public image. Instead, Harris's responses led to a fiery backlash, with the interview garnering over 35,000 dislikes—almost triple the number of likes it received. This may be the most cringe-worthy interview you've ever witnessed. Meanwhile, Donald Trump appears to be recalibrating his approach as he gears up for the final stretch of the presidential race. In a surprising move that aligns with our earlier suggestions, Trump might be setting the stage for a potential comeback. Buckle up for a front-row seat to the ultimate showdown: the Angry Orange Man versus the Joyful Word Salad Warrior. FOLLOW ME https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB #kamalaharris #donaldtrumpnews #election2024 #cnn #川普
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z0BrFaBPD0w In a dramatic turn of events, Kamala Harris's recent interview—her first in nearly 40 days—unfolded as a high-stakes fiasco. Scheduled on CNN, the interview was expected to be a safe platform with soft questions designed to polish her public image. Instead, Harris's responses led to a fiery backlash, with the interview garnering over 35,000 dislikes—almost triple the number of likes it received. This may be the most cringe-worthy interview you've ever witnessed. Meanwhile, Donald Trump appears to be recalibrating his approach as he gears up for the final stretch of the presidential race. In a surprising move that aligns with our earlier suggestions, Trump might be setting the stage for a potential comeback. Buckle up for a front-row seat to the ultimate showdown: the Angry Orange Man versus the Joyful Word Salad Warrior. item.title: They LIED to YOU. And they're STILL LYING..

item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wcKSk2N7Oy0 This Episode is a very sensitive topic. So we must be very careful how we discuss it. Subjects include the fbi, Hunter biden, Donald Trump, RFK Jr., The House Judiciary Committee, Tulsi Gabbard and Joe Biden. Hold on to your butts. https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB 聯絡信箱: goodbikemob@gmail.com #donaldtrumpnews #rfkjr #joebiden #fbi
